title: Student Details
instructions: Backend me missing GET route '/students' ko complete karein taaki table me data show ho jaye.

starterCode.index.html:
Student Details

IDNameCourse

hints: Fetch URL '/students' se match hona chahiye.
Directly 'require' kiye gaye data ko res.send() karein.
explanation: Sample pattern ke hisaab se humne require("./data.json") kiya hai, isliye res.send(data) karke seedhe bhej sakte hain. HTML me fetch('/students') hai toh backend me vahi route hona chahiye.
